How configure 2FA on Binance ?

[[reply_to_current]]

🟡 **Setting Up 2FA on Binance**

Here's how to configure Two-Factor Authentication on your Binance account:

---

**Step 1 — Log in to your account**
Go to [binance.com](https://www.binance.com) and sign in.

---

**Step 2 — Go to Security Settings**
- Click your profile icon (top right)
- Select **Security**

---

**Step 3 — Choose your 2FA method**

Binance offers several options:

| Method | Security Level |
|---|---|
| 🔐 Authenticator App (Google/Binance Auth) | ⭐⭐⭐ Recommended |
| 📱 SMS Verification | ⭐⭐ |
| 🔑 Passkey / Security Key | ⭐⭐⭐⭐ |

---

**Step 4 — Set up Authenticator App (recommended)**
1. Download **Google Authenticator** or **Binance Authenticator**
2. Click **Enable** next to *Authenticator App*
3. Scan the **QR code** with the app
4. Enter the **6-digit code** generated
5. Save your **backup key** somewhere safe ⚠️

---

**⚠️ Important Tips**
- Never share your 2FA codes with anyone
- Save your backup/recovery key offline
- Binance will **never** ask for your 2FA code via chat

---

📚 Official guide: [Binance Help Center — 2FA Setup](https://www.binance.com/en/support/faq/how-to-set-up-google-authenticator-2fa-115004459291)

What's Trading spot ?

[[reply_to_current]]

🟡 **Spot Trading on Binance**

---

**What is Spot Trading?**

Spot trading is the **simplest and most common** form of trading. You buy or sell a cryptocurrency **at the current market price**, and the asset is transferred **immediately** to your wallet.

> 💡 You own the actual crypto — no leverage, no borrowing.

---

**How it works on Binance**

1. Go to **Trade → Spot** on Binance
2. Choose a trading pair (e.g. **BTC/USDT**)
3. Select your order type
4. Enter the amount and confirm

---

**Order Types Available**

| Type | Description |
|---|---|
| **Market** | Buy/sell instantly at current price |
| **Limit** | Set your own price — executes when reached |
| **Stop-Limit** | Triggers a limit order at a set price |
| **OCO** | Two orders at once — take profit + stop loss |

---

**Key Facts**

- ✅ You own the actual asset
- ✅ No expiry date on your positions
- ✅ Suitable for beginners
- 📉 Spot trading fees: typically **0.1%** per trade (lower with BNB)

---

**Spot vs Futures — Quick Comparison**

| | Spot | Futures |
|---|---|---|
| Own the asset | ✅ Yes | ❌ No |
| Leverage | ❌ No | ✅ Up to 125x |
| Risk level | Lower | Higher |
| Best for | Beginners | Experienced traders |

---

📚 Learn more: [Binance Spot Trading Guide](https://www.binance.com/en/support/faq/spot-trading)

Do you have any questions about placing a specific order?

[[reply_to_current]]

🟡 **Binance Spot Trading — Direct Links**

Here are the official links to get started:

---

**🚀 Start Trading**
🔗 [Binance Spot Trading Platform](https://www.binance.com/en/trade/BTC_USDT)

---

**📚 Guides & Tutorials**
🔗 [How to Trade Spot — Official Guide](https://www.binance.com/en/support/faq/how-to-trade-spot-on-binance-360037719571)
🔗 [Understanding Order Types](https://www.binance.com/en/support/faq/order-types-on-binance-115003764431)
🔗 [How to Use OCO Orders](https://www.binance.com/en/support/faq/what-is-an-oco-order-360032593751)

---

**💰 Fees**
🔗 [Binance Trading Fee Schedule](https://www.binance.com/en/fee/schedule)

---

**📱 Mobile App**
🔗 [Download Binance App](https://www.binance.com/en/download)

---

**⚠️ Before You Start**
- Make sure your account is **verified (KYC)**
- Deposit funds first via **Deposit → Crypto or Fiat**
- Start with a **small amount** to get familiar

---

Is there anything else you need help with? 😊
